linkedin.text:
Monaco-level luxury. Without the Monaco crowds.

Most companies still default to the same three incentive destinations. Your top performers have already seen them.

Tivat's Porto Montenegro is the alternative few think to ask for: a superyacht marina set inside a fjord, dark mountains dropping straight into turquoise water. Charter a yacht for the closing dinner. Take the team up the Bay of Kotor at sunrise. End the night dockside under the peaks.

We've spent 15+ years producing incentive travel across 120+ countries, and the destinations that move people are rarely the obvious ones. Tivat earns its place.

From business to pleasure. DM us "TIVAT" or book a call to see the program.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #MICE
linkedin.cta: DM us or book a call

facebook.text:
Imagine rewarding your team with Monaco-level luxury — minus the crowds.

That's Tivat, Montenegro. A superyacht marina tucked inside a fjord, mountains falling straight into turquoise water. Charter a yacht for the closing dinner, cruise the Bay of Kotor at sunrise, and end the night dockside under the peaks.

Where would your team's next incentive trip take them? Tell us in the comments, or send us a message and we'll build the program.

From business to pleasure.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Montenegro #MICE

image_prompt: Aerial view over Porto Montenegro in Tivat at golden hour, rows of gleaming superyachts moored along the marina, the deep fjord-like Bay of Kotor framed by dramatic dark mountains plunging into still turquoise water, tiny figures strolling the waterfront promenade far below, soft haze on the distant peaks. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
